title: Section 18 versus section 20 intent trap

mainIssue: The charge is s18, but intent evidence and medical detail are thin.
uncertainEvidence: whether specific intent can be supported on the served papers
expectedTodayIssue: Raise charge-fit and missing intent/medical material without saying the prosecution case collapses.
